content:
# elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow Daily Update (Apr 26, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 26, 2026, focused on strengthening the robustness and reliability of the n8n workflow plugin. The team opened four new pull requests centered on enhancing prompt hardening, implementing deterministic safety nets for credential management, improving keyword extraction, and introducing a layered defense mechanism for workflow validation.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Workflow Validation and Safety**
    *   Introduced a `validateAndRepair` pre-deploy pass featuring a retry loop and anti-hallucination layered defense [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/23).
    *   Implemented a deterministic safety net for injecting missing credential blocks [#21](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/21).

*   **Prompt Engineering and Context Management**
    *   Added an extension point for `RuntimeContextProvider` and performed prompt hardening [#20](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/20).
    *   Updated prompt types and services to include a `preferredProviders` bias hint for improved keyword extraction [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/22).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#23](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/23): feat(validation): validateAndRepair pre-deploy pass + retry loop + anti-hallucination layered defense.
*   [#22](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/22): feat(prompt,types,service): preferredProviders bias hint for keyword extraction.
*   [#21](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/21): feat(workflow): deterministic injectMissingCredentialBlocks safety net.
*   [#20](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/plugin-n8n-workflow/pull/20): feat(prompt,types): RuntimeContextProvider extension point + prompt hardening.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
